revision.text: {{Main other|{{Top icon | imagename = symbol support vote.svg | wikilink = Wikipedia:Good articles* | description = This is a good article. Click here for more information. | id = good-star | maincat = [[Category:Good articles]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Good article]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] }}|<includeonly>{{Error|[[Template:Good article]] is only for [[Wikipedia:Good articles]].}}</includeonly> }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:Elli|Elli]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Good articles]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Main other|{{Top icon | imagename = symbol support vote.svg | wikilink = Wikipedia:Good articles* | description = This is a good article. Click here for more information. | id = good-star | maincat = }}|<includeonly>{{Error|[[Template:Good article]] is only for [[Wikipedia:Good articles]].}}</includeonly> }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Main other|{{Top icon | imagename = symbol support vote.svg | wikilink = Wikipedia:Good articles* | description = This is a good article. revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Good_article here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
